channel.title: Ethereum on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Ethereum on Archive 03

item.title: Solana ($SOL): Is the 'Ethereum Killer' Ready for the Throne? 2026 Outlook
item.description: Solana ($SOL) is gaining traction as a true competitor to Ethereum thanks to low fees, high speeds, and surging DEX and stablecoin activity. We examine whether it’s a legitimate rival or just a high-beta altcoin.

item.title: When Will Altcoin Season Finally Arrive? The Growing Anxiety
item.description: While Bitcoin smashes all-time highs, why are altcoins so quiet? Pessimism grows that an alt season may not come, clashing with optimism that an explosive rally is imminent, following historical patterns. We’ll deeply analyze the current state and future strategies for altcoin investing through data and expert forecasts.

item.title: Ethereum Breaks $4,000: Is This the Starting Gun for Altseason?
item.description: With Ethereum surpassing the $4,000 mark, anticipation for a full-blown altseason is growing. Three distinct characters engage in a deep discussion centered on data, growth potential, and potential risks to determine whether this is the signal for a new opportunity or a warning sign of an overheated market.

item.title: 'Altcoin King' Ethereum: Price Outlook for H2 2025?
item.description: We analyze the price outlook for Ethereum in the second half of 2025, which is drawing intense interest with the launch of a U.S. spot ETF. Three characters engage in a sharp debate, weighing the massive tailwind of institutional capital inflow against potential risks like intensifying competition from Solana and macroeconomic uncertainty.
